# Copilot Instructions

## Agent Workflow

| Task | Agent | Command |
|------|-------|---------|
| Plan a feature or task | Planner | `@planner` |
| Implement code | Developer | `@developer` |
| Write or fix tests | Testing Expert | `@testing-expert` |
| Review changes | Reviewer | `@reviewer` |
| Full task cycle | Orchestrator | `@task-workflow-orchestrator` |

Agents auto-load relevant skills from `.github/skills/`.
